loading rack were not included in last year's inventory.  In addition spill ì
emissions have changed for 1997.

type.fr: Commentaire sur les rejets sur le site

comments.comment:
Calculation errors in spreadsheet.  Emissions from loading rack were not ì
included by mistake.  Spill emissions changed.
